name.description: Layout display name from the template (e.g. 'Title Slide', 'Two Content')

index.description: Zero-based index of this layout within the master's layout list

master_index.description: Index of the parent slide master (null if only one master)

inferred_type.description: VLM-classified semantic layout type (e.g. cover, content_single_col, comparison). Null before VLM analysis.

inferred_type_confidence.description: Confidence of the inferred_type classification. Null before VLM analysis.

font_family.description: Explicit font family from defRPr/rPr latin typeface (null if inherited from theme)

column_count.description: Number of content columns detected in this layout (0 if not a columnar layout)

has_image_slot.description: Whether this layout contains a picture placeholder

augmentable.description: Whether this layout has free space where additional shapes can be placed without overlapping existing content

content_capacity.description: VLM-assessed content capacity of this layout (T1)

visual_weight.description: VLM-assessed visual prominence/heaviness of this layout (light, medium, heavy). Null before VLM analysis.

is_builtin.description: Whether this layout belongs to a built-in default master (non-brand, skip during generation)

anyOf.description: Aggregated typography info from layout placeholders

fontFamilies.description: Distinct font families declared in placeholder defRPr/rPr

sizes.description: All distinct font sizes in pt, sorted ascending

hasBold.description: Whether any placeholder has bold text

typographySummary.description: Aggregated typography from layout placeholders (null if no font info)

anyOf.description: Aggregated color info from layout placeholders, shapes, and background

background.description: Background color value — 'inherited', theme ref (e.g. 'accent2'), or hex

themeRefs.description: Unique schemeClr references from placeholders and shapes (e.g. 'tx1', 'bg2')

hardcoded.description: Unique srgbClr hex values from placeholders and shapes

fills.description: Deduplicated shape fill values (theme refs + hex, mixed)

colorSummary.description: Aggregated color info from layout (null if no color info)

color_ratio.description: Color system summary (primary, secondary, accent, palette_strategy)

visual_hierarchy_method.description: How visual hierarchy is established (e.g. H1:36pt/Bold → H2:24pt/SemiBold → Body:14pt/Regular)

component_style_pattern.description: Shape/component style conventions (e.g. rounded corners, flat design)

cover_vs_content_contrast.description: How cover/divider slides contrast with content slides

description.description: Visual description of how this motif appears in the template

visual_motifs.description: Recurring visual patterns (e.g. rounded image frames, left accent bars)

rule.description: Concise imperative sentence describing a brand-specific constraint.

vlm_guardrails.description: Brand-specific guardrails inferred by VLM in Step 4b. Consumed by generate_composer_digest.py.

design_language.description: Cross-layout design language extracted by VLM analysis

aesthetic_principles.description: Generalizable, actionable design principles synthesized from cross-sample VLM analysis in Step 4d. Bridges the gap between descriptive design_language (WHAT the template looks like) and prescriptive generation guidance (HOW to design new things that belong). Consumed by branded-pptx-generator via composer-digest.

slide_index.description: Zero-based index of this slide in the presentation

title.description: Title text extracted from the slide's title placeholder

category.description: Content category derived from layout name or slide content (e.g. 'title', 'content', 'chart')

layout_name.description: Name of the slide layout this slide is based on

has_content.description: Whether this slide contains real content beyond placeholder markers. true = sample/guide slide worth analyzing.

shape_count.description: Total number of shapes (non-placeholder) on this slide

keywords.description: Content keywords extracted from slide text for search/matching

guideType.description: Guide slide subtype, set when role is guide or hybrid

contentPattern.description: One-line description of the content arrangement (e.g. 'two-column text with left image', 'three stat cards in a row'). VLM-assigned.

patternDescription.description: One-line description of the overall visual pattern demonstrated by this slide (e.g., 'Gantt chart with horizontal task bars and time axis'). null for simple text/placeholder layouts.

complexElements.description: Named visual patterns present on this slide (e.g. 'threeColumnGrid', 'numberedTimeline', 'iconCardRow'). Empty array if text-only. VLM-assigned.

cloneCandidate.description: Whether this slide is suitable for clone-based generation strategies (clone-sample or clone-layout). true if the slide's content can be swapped while preserving structure. VLM-assigned.

layoutRelationship.description: How this slide's actual content relates to its declared layout (e.g. faithful, extended, divergent). VLM-assigned.

styleSourceType.description: Where this slide's styling originates — inherited from layout or applied directly on the slide. VLM-assigned.

styleRefSuitability.description: How suitable this slide is as a style reference for generating new slides with similar visual patterns. VLM-assigned.

layoutMismatchSummary.description: Summary of what matches vs. diverges between this slide and its layout template (e.g. 'adds gradient bar not in layout; title position matches'). VLM-assigned.

role.description: Slide role: 'sample' for normal samples, 'guide' for template usage guides, 'hybrid' for slides that are both instructional and demonstrative.

anyOf.description: Typography inventory extracted from all text runs in this slide

fontFamilies.description: All font families found in rPr/defRPr (includes theme-resolved names)

nonThemeFonts.description: Font families not matching identity.fonts.major or minor

sizes.description: All distinct font sizes in pt, sorted ascending

typographyUsage.description: Typography inventory from slide content (null before extraction)

anyOf.description: Color inventory extracted from all fills and text runs in this slide

themeRefsWithMods.description: schemeClr references with luminance modifiers for tint/shade tracking

hardcodedToThemeMap.description: Map of hardcoded hex → matching theme slot name (exact match against identity.colors.scheme)

backgroundFill.description: Slide background (schemeClr ref or hex), null if inherited from layout

colorUsage.description: Color inventory from slide content (null before extraction)

slides.description: List of slide_file values identified as guide slides

rulesExtracted.description: Total number of structured rules extracted

template_guide.description: Structured rules extracted from template usage guide slides

anyOf.description: Cross-template font usage summary aggregated from layouts and sample slides

inLayouts.description: Distinct font families found across all layout placeholders

inSamples.description: Distinct font families found across all sample slides

nonThemeFonts.description: Font families appearing in layouts or samples that are not in theme major/minor

allFamilies.description: Union of all font families (theme + layouts + samples)

fontInventory.description: Cross-template font inventory (null if not yet computed)

anyOf.description: Cross-template color usage summary aggregated from layouts and sample slides

inLayouts.description: Number of layouts referencing this slot

inSamples.description: Number of sample slides referencing this slot

themeSlotUsage.description: Per theme color slot: frequency of use across layouts and samples

matchesSlot.description: Theme slot this hex exactly matches, or null

hardcodedColors.description: All hardcoded srgbClr values with theme-match analysis

complianceRisk.description: Risk level based on hardcoded color ratio: low = all match theme or none; medium = <30% unmatched; high = >30% unmatched

colorInventory.description: Cross-template color inventory (null if not yet computed)

applies_to.description: Natural language description of what this rule applies to (e.g., 'headline', 'body text', 'call-to-action')

rawQuote.description: Original text from the guide slide that states this rule

sourceSlide.description: slide_file of the guide slide this rule was extracted from

confidence.description: Confidence of the rule extraction (from VLM)

AestheticPrinciples.description: Generalizable, actionable design principles synthesized by cross-sample VLM analysis. Five dimensions: composition, color, typography, shape, and pattern recipes. Each dimension captures not just WHAT (description) but WHY (rationale) and HOW (implementation guidance for novel designs).

patternRecipes.description: Generalizable visual pattern families extracted from sample slides. Each recipe is a reusable structural template with scaling rules, color logic, and spacing specs — enabling the generator to build brand-consistent layouts for content the template never demonstrated.

CompositionSystem.description: How space is organized across the template — alignment logic, margin conventions, zone allocation, and density norms.

alignmentAnchors.description: Dominant alignment logic observed across slides (e.g., 'left-aligned titles, left-aligned body, right-aligned decorative accents'). Describes where elements anchor spatially.

marginStrategy.description: Edge margin and inter-element gap conventions, expressed as % of slide dimensions or EMU.

edgeMarginPct.description: Typical distance from slide edge to nearest content element, as % of slide width.

interElementGapPct.description: Typical gap between adjacent content elements (cards, columns), as % of slide width.

titleContentGapPct.description: Typical vertical gap between title region and content region, as % of slide height.

variationNotes.description: How margins vary by slide type (e.g., 'cover slides use edge-to-edge imagery, content slides enforce 5% margins').

zoneAllocation.description: Per-slide-type zone maps showing how slide area is divided among title, content, and decoration.

slideType.description: Slide type this allocation applies to (e.g., 'cover', 'content_single_col', 'divider').

titleZonePct.description: % of slide height allocated to the title zone.

contentZonePct.description: % of slide height allocated to the main content zone.

decorationZone.description: Where decorative elements are placed (e.g., 'bottom-right corner', 'full-bleed background', 'left edge strip').

densitySpectrum.description: Observed content density range across samples and guidance on when to use each end.

low.description: When low density (generous whitespace) is used (e.g., 'cover, divider, hero image slides').

high.description: When high density (compact layout) is used (e.g., 'data tables, multi-column comparison slides').

default.description: The default density for standard content slides.

symmetryPreference.description: Whether the template favors symmetric or asymmetric layouts, and when each applies (e.g., 'asymmetric for text+image, symmetric for multi-card grids').

ColorSemantics.description: How color carries meaning — semantic role assignments, intensity logic, palette balance, and emphasis progression.

roleAssignment.description: Maps semantic roles to theme color slots with usage contexts. This is the prescriptive color guide: when building a new element, look up its semantic role here to find the correct theme color.

intensityGradient.description: How tint-to-saturated color progression is used across the template (e.g., 'peach-to-accent1 progression for sequential/chronological elements', 'not used — flat fills only').

paletteBalance.description: Observed proportional breakdown of color usage across all samples.

neutralPct.description: % of visual area occupied by neutral colors (dk1/lt1/dk2/lt2).

brandPrimaryPct.description: % of visual area occupied by the primary brand accent.

secondaryAccentPct.description: % of visual area occupied by secondary and tertiary accents.

balanceGuideline.description: Prescriptive rule for maintaining this balance in new designs.

contrastStrategy.description: Overall contrast approach with rationale (e.g., 'dark mode — light text on dark backgrounds throughout; high contrast reinforces the outdoor-adventure premium feel').

colorEmphasisProgression.description: How the brand escalates visual emphasis through color (e.g., 'neutral dk1 (baseline) → accent1 text (moderate emphasis) → accent1 fill (high emphasis) → full-bleed accent1 background (maximum impact)').

ColorRoleAssignment.description: Maps a semantic role to a theme color slot with usage context.

themeSlot.description: Theme color key (e.g., 'accent1', 'dk1', 'lt1'). Must reference a valid slot in identity.colors.scheme.

useWhen.description: When to apply this color role (e.g., 'focal point elements, CTA buttons, active process step').

tintShade.description: Optional tint/shade modifier (e.g., 'lumMod 40000 for muted variant'). null means use the color at full saturation.

TypographicSystem.description: How text creates visual rhythm — the full type scale, emphasis mechanisms, and spacing conventions.

scaleStops.description: The complete typographic scale used across samples. Each stop defines a role in the hierarchy with its size, weight, and usage context.

scaleRatio.description: If a consistent ratio exists between adjacent scale stops (e.g., 1.5, 2.0). null if sizes don't follow a geometric progression.

emphasisMechanism.description: How the template creates emphasis within text: which combination of size, weight, color, and style is used for what context (e.g., 'size + weight for heading hierarchy; accent1 color for section titles; bold for inline emphasis; italic reserved for brand accent headers only').

spacingConvention.description: Line spacing norms, paragraph gap norms, and how they relate to font size (e.g., '1.2x line height for body; paragraph gap ≈ 0.5x font size; generous inter-section spacing').

textDensityGuideline.description: How much text per slide type and how to handle overflow (e.g., 'cover: title + subtitle only; content: max 6 bullet points at 18pt; overflow → split across slides, never auto-shrink').

TypeScaleStop.description: A single stop in the typographic scale.

font.description: Font family name (e.g., 'Trade Gothic Next HvyCd', 'Avenir Next LT Pro'). Should match identity.fonts entries.

useWhen.description: When this stop is used (e.g., 'cover/divider hero text', 'content slide titles', 'body text and bullets').

ShapeGrammar.description: How shapes communicate — the shape vocabulary, composition rules, and scaling behavior for building new visual elements.

primitiveVocabulary.description: The complete shape vocabulary observed across samples. Each entry defines a shape type with its styling treatment and primary use case. When creating new elements, choose ONLY from this vocabulary.

compositionRules.description: How shapes relate to each other and to content — layering order, containment patterns, adjacency rules (e.g., 'decorative shapes always behind content layer; cards in horizontal rows, equal-width; never overlap content shapes').

connectorStyle.description: How elements are visually connected (e.g., 'thin lines or gradient bars connecting process nodes; no arrowheads; accent1 color', or 'no connectors — elements are spatially grouped only').

decorationPlacement.description: Where decorative elements go relative to content and how they scale with slide type (e.g., 'topographic patterns in corners on content slides, full-bleed on dividers; never overlay text content').

scalingBehavior.description: How repeated elements (cards, columns, steps) scale when the item count changes (e.g., 'redistribute width equally within content zone; maintain consistent inter-element gap; if >6 items, switch to 2-row grid').

ShapePrimitive.description: A single entry in the shape vocabulary.

treatment.description: Styling treatment applied to this shape (e.g., 'sharp corners, flat solid fill', 'thin accent1 outline, transparent fill', 'dashed gray stroke, no fill').

primaryUse.description: Primary use case for this shape (e.g., 'content cards and process steps', 'icon containers in timelines', 'decorative contour patterns').

PatternRecipe.description: A generalizable visual pattern family extracted from sample slides. Provides a reusable structural template that the generator can adapt to new content with different item counts or data.

description.description: One-line description of the pattern (e.g., 'N equal-width cards in a horizontal row showing sequential steps with tint progression').

skeleton.description: Structural template defining the pattern's anatomy.

direction.description: Primary flow direction of the pattern.

elementsPerUnit.description: Named elements that make up each repeating unit (e.g., ['stepNumber', 'stepTitle', 'stepBody'] for a process step).

wrapperTreatment.description: How each unit is visually wrapped (e.g., 'rectangle card with graduated fill', 'no wrapper — elements grouped spatially', 'hexagonal badge outline').

fixedChrome.description: Fixed elements that don't repeat (e.g., 'horizontal spine line connecting all nodes', 'gradient timeline bar'). null if none.

scalingRules.description: How the pattern adapts to different item counts.

minItems.description: Minimum number of items the pattern supports.

maxItems.description: Maximum items in a single row/column before overflow behavior kicks in.

overflowBehavior.description: What happens when maxItems is exceeded (e.g., 'wrap to second row', 'split across slides', 'reduce element size'). null if maxItems is a hard limit.

colorAssignment.description: How colors are distributed across the pattern's elements.

detail.description: Specifics of the color assignment (e.g., 'start at 10% tint of accent1, end at 100% accent1, interpolate linearly', 'odd items accent1, even items accent2').

spacingSpec.description: Spacing values for the pattern, in % of slide dimensions.

interElementGapPct.description: Gap between repeating units, as % of slide width (horizontal) or height (vertical).

internalPaddingPct.description: Padding inside each unit's wrapper, as % of unit width.

contentZoneUsagePct.description: What % of the available content zone the pattern occupies (e.g., 90 means 90% of the zone, leaving 10% breathing room).

sourceSlides.description: Sample slides that demonstrate this pattern (for reference and validation).
